name: Butterscotch Sauce
steps: In a large pot take sugar to a caramel, make sure its all liquid
Add salt and add butter, mix on heat until all mixed
Add cream and cook until back to boil
Simmer for 10 mins until all sugar has dissolved
Strain and blast chill with paper touching the top for no skin

other_details.notes: For service mix black sesame oil into this to make black sesame sauce
